{{Quote|Flee little worm. Flee little coward.|Cyssc Blackscale|<ref name="SWG:RotW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>}}
'''[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Cyssc Blackscale''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] and the leader of a group of [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] (called the [[Blackscale Clan/Legends|Blackscale]]) in [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He was a very powerful being, with an army of guards at his command. He was killed in the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] above Kashyyyk when a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], under the command of [[Gursan Bryes]], killed his allies.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Cyssc Blackscale appeared as a non-player character in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
